commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 17. "Make Thy Face to shine upon Thy servant" (ver. 16). Make it known to men, who do not think that I belong unto Thee, that Thy Face is bent upon me, and that I serve Thee. "Save me in Thy mercy."

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Shine propitiously, so as to free me from this storm. (Calmet)
Make me acquainted with the right path, and deliver me. (Worthington)
